_comment: NPC: Duanmu Ji (端木吉). Canon ID: N90. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Duanmu Ji

perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Soul Formation elder; soul manipulation visible

note: Soul Refining Sect Soul Formation elder

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.
